title: Investigate and fix Mandarin word of the day repetition

log.context: Investigate and fix Mandarin word of the day repetition

Here is what was found and fixed:

**Root cause:** The Mandarin (and Spanish) prompts in `/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/activities/word_activity.py` were static module-level string constants with no date context and no instruction to avoid repetition. GPT-4o-mini at temperature 0.9 still gravitates toward the same "textbook greatest hits" chengyu (画龙点睛, 一石二鸟, etc.) because they are disproportionately represented in training data.
